content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Magic Missile
description: Magic Missile is a Maliwan grenade mod from Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep. On throw, it releases homing child projectiles that ricochet off surfaces and will retarget to newly spawned or revealed enemies. They detonate on impact or after travelling for a while and can catch you in the blast. The projectiles are always slag, making it especially useful in Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode. Like other Dragon Keep magic grenades, it passively regenerates grenades over time.
notes:
Badass Wizards can drop the purple-rarity version. The homing, guaranteed slag and ammo-free regeneration make it broadly useful for slagging or finishing targets.

A reliable farm is the Magic Slaughter (Badass Round) at Murderlin's Temple; you can also try the Sacrificial Altar in Dragon Keep to spawn a Badass Wizard, though the drop is rare.

Named after the Dungeons and Dragons spell. Killing The Darkness with it opens the door behind to a Dice Chest. With it equipped, Axton may shout "Magic Missile!" when deploying his Sabre Turret.

special.description:
Throw to spawn homing slag projectiles that explode on impact. Regenerates grenades over time.

Blue rarity fires 2 child grenades; purple rarity fires 4. Consumes 1 grenade per throw.
special.title: No wand required. Just point and shoot.

abilities: Slowly regenerates grenade ammo over time.
